title: Azure incident affecting West US 2
impact:
Between 09:39 UTC and 17:05 UTC on 29 May 2026, a platform issue resulted in impact to the Azure OpenAI service across multiple regions. Customers may have experienced degraded service health where requests intermittently failed, returned HTTP 5XX errors, or experienced increased latency.
What do we know so far?
